title: draba gilliesii var. davilae
intro: Draba gilliesii var. davilae is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Draba gilliesii plant, a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is a small, annual or biennial plant with white or pink flowers that have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
